name: e-commerce-analytics-dashboard
description: A MERN and TypeScript e-commerce analytics dashboard portfolio project.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server,shared -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @ecommerce-dashboard/client" "npm run dev -w @ecommerce-dashboard/server" "npm run dev -w @ecommerce-dashboard/shared"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ecommerce-dashboard/shared && npm run build -w @ecommerce-dashboard/client && npm run build -w @ecommerce-dashboard/server
